name: Stripe
one_liner: Payment processing platform for online payments, billing, and financial infrastructure.
self_serve_notes: Anyone can sign up for a free Stripe account and get test-mode API keys instantly from the dashboard.

api_surface.notes: Extensive REST API covering payments, billing, invoicing, subscriptions, Connect, Treasury, and more.

existing_mcp_or_composio_toolkit.notes: Composio lists a Stripe toolkit (415 tools); Stripe also runs an official first-party MCP server at mcp.stripe.com.

name: Plaid
one_liner: Bank-account linking and financial data API connecting apps to users' bank accounts.
self_serve_notes: Sandbox client_id/secret are issued instantly on signup, but Production access must be separately requested via the Dashboard and is subject to review.

api_surface.notes: Broad REST API spanning Auth, Transactions, Identity, Balance, Liabilities, Investments, and more.

existing_mcp_or_composio_toolkit.notes: No Plaid toolkit found in Composio catalog (404); Plaid itself runs an official Dashboard MCP server for account diagnostics/analytics, not general Plaid API access.

name: Binance
one_liner: Cryptocurrency exchange API for spot, futures, margin trading, and wallet operations.
self_serve_notes: Any Binance account holder can generate API keys immediately from the API Management dashboard, free of charge.

api_surface.notes: Covers Spot, Futures (USDⓈ-M/COIN-M), Margin, Options, Wallet, Convert, and Web3/DEX endpoints.

existing_mcp_or_composio_toolkit.notes: No Binance toolkit found in Composio catalog (404, has CoinMarketCap instead); several community-built Binance MCP servers exist on GitHub.

name: Paygent Connect
one_liner: Payment gateway product name; no distinct public developer API/docs could be confirmed.
self_serve_notes: No public developer documentation site for a product named 'Paygent Connect' was found; NMI (its rumored underlying gateway) and the Japanese Paygent Co. gateway both require a merchant/partner relationship to get credentials.

api_surface.notes: Could not locate official public API reference docs specifically for 'Paygent Connect'; related NMI and Paygent Co. gateways gate access behind onboarding.

existing_mcp_or_composio_toolkit.notes: No Composio toolkit or MCP server found; flagged as a long-tail unknown with thin public docs, requiring human verification.

name: iPayX
one_liner: FX forensic audit tool scoring cross-border payment/FX fees and routing.
self_serve_notes: Free-tier API key (10 audits/day) is obtainable directly from the iPayX dashboard, no sales contact needed.

api_surface.notes: Small surface (a handful of FX audit/scoring tools) exposed primarily via an official MCP server, plus a lightly-documented REST reference.

existing_mcp_or_composio_toolkit.notes: iPayX ships its own official MCP server ('mcp-fx-audit'); no Composio toolkit found — flagged as a thin-docs long-tail app.

name: QuickBooks
one_liner: Cloud accounting software API for invoicing, bookkeeping, and financial reporting.
self_serve_notes: Free Intuit developer account gives instant OAuth2 app creation and up to 5 pre-populated sandbox companies with all API tools at no cost.

api_surface.notes: Broad accounting API (customers, invoices, bills, payments, reports, SQL-like queries) plus Payments API.

existing_mcp_or_composio_toolkit.notes: Composio lists a QuickBooks toolkit with 105 tools using OAuth2.

name: Xero
one_liner: Cloud accounting platform API for invoices, contacts, payments, and financial reports.
self_serve_notes: Free developer.xero.com account plus a free, fully functional Demo Company let anyone build and test against real API calls immediately.

api_surface.notes: Covers accounting, payroll, assets, projects, and reporting endpoints.

existing_mcp_or_composio_toolkit.notes: Composio lists a Xero toolkit with 41 tools using OAuth2.

name: Brex
one_liner: Corporate card and spend management platform API for cards, expenses, and budgets.
self_serve_notes: Requires being an existing Brex account admin or card admin who accepts the developer API agreement before generating a token; not open to arbitrary developers without a Brex account.

api_surface.notes: Covers cards, transactions, expenses, budgets, statements, and user/team management.

existing_mcp_or_composio_toolkit.notes: Composio lists a Brex toolkit with 84 tools supporting OAuth2 and API Key.

main_blocker: requires an existing Brex company account/admin

name: Ramp
one_liner: Corporate card and spend management API for transactions, cards, and reimbursements.
self_serve_notes: Existing Ramp customers can create an OAuth app (client credentials grant) from Settings > Developer, but a separate sandbox environment requires contacting an account manager for approval.

api_surface.notes: Covers transactions, cards, users, departments, bills, reimbursements, accounting integrations, and webhooks.

existing_mcp_or_composio_toolkit.notes: Composio lists a Ramp toolkit with 88 tools using OAuth2.

main_blocker: requires existing paying Ramp customer account plus AM approval for sandbox

name: PitchBook
one_liner: Private capital markets research platform providing deal, investor, and fund data.
self_serve_notes: PitchBook API/Direct Data is a separately contracted enterprise product; access requires being a PitchBook client and requesting API/sandbox keys through an account manager.

api_surface.notes: RESTful API covering deals, investors, funds, people, LPs, and service providers, gated behind a paid contract.

existing_mcp_or_composio_toolkit.notes: No dedicated PitchBook toolkit found on Composio's site or in catalog search.

main_blocker: enterprise contract/account-manager gated, no free public API tier
